security.csp: default-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: asset: http://asset.localhost; font-src 'self' data:; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost http://127.0.0.1:* https://api.github.com https://github.com https://cnb.cool https://pypi.org https://files.pythonhosted.org https://mirrors.aliyun.com https://pypi.tuna.tsinghua.edu.cn https://pypi.mirrors.ustc.edu.cn https://mirrors.cloud.tencent.com https://mirrors.huaweicloud.com; frame-src http://127.0.0.1:*; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'none'; form-action 'self'; frame-ancestors 'none'

bundle.longDescription: GSDesk helps Windows and macOS users initialize, run, repair, inspect logs, and open WebConsole for gsuid_core without using a terminal.
